nasb.text: Therefore I have come out to meet you, To seek your presence earnestly, and I have found you.

esv.text: so now I have come out to meet you, to seek you eagerly, and I have found you.

cnv.text: 因此，我出來迎接你， 切切尋找你，終於找到你。

ccb.text: 因此我出来四处寻找你， 终于找到了你！

csbs.text: 因此我就出来迎接你， 切切寻找你的面， 总算找到了你。
